message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "Node" as Node
participant "RF" as RF
participant "Link" as Link
participant "Hub" as Hub
participant "testdomain.com" as testdomain

note right of RF: BROADCAST: 256LW,R,F,KI7EST-0
activate RF
deactivate RF

note right of RF: Repeated every 5 minutes while link is idle
note right of RF: ...

Node -> RF : CONTROL: Request Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
activate Node
RF -> Link : CONTROL: Request Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
activate RF
Link -> RF : CONTROL: Grant Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1
deactivate RF
RF -> Node : CONTROL: Grant Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1
deactivate Node

note right of RF: First frame has Start Flag set
Node -> RF : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
activate Node
RF -> Link : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
activate RF
Link -> RF : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, _R, 0C, <FEC>
deactivate RF
RF -> Node : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, _R, 0C, <FEC>
deactivate Node

note over Node,RF: Repeat until all data frames are sent.\nNote that last frame has end flag set\nIf Link as response for command/packet then\nResponse Flag will be set and second data transfer happens in reverse.

Node -> RF : DATA: 0x0020 256B,4F,_S,E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
activate Node
RF -> Link : DATA: 0x0020 256B,4F,_S,E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
activate RF
Link -> Link : Final packet, assembled sequence
activate Link
Link -> Link : <sig> 0001 REST KI7EST@rfnethub.net POST testdomain.com/ping
Link -> Hub : /user/KI7EST/keys
activate Link
Hub -> Link : "MTIzNDU2Nzg=MjM0NTY3ODEyMzQ1Njc4MTIzNDU2Nzg="
deactivate Link
Link -> Link : Verify signature
Link -> testdomain : /ping
activate Link
testdomain -> Link : 200
deactivate Link
deactivate Link
Link -> RF : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R, 0C, <FEC>
deactivate RF
RF -> Node : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R, 0C, <FEC>
deactivate Node

Link -> RF : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,E <FEC> KI7EST@rfnethub.net 0001 REST 200
activate Link
RF -> Node : DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,E <FEC> KI7EST@rfnethub.net 0001 REST 200
activate RF
Node -> RF : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000,_N,_R,0C <FEC>
deactivate RF
RF -> Link : ACK: 0x0001 0x0000,_N,_R,0C <FEC>
deactivate Link

Node -> RF : CONTROL: Close Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
activate Node
RF -> Link : CONTROL: Close Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
activate RF
Link -> RF : CONTROL: Closed Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1
deactivate RF
RF -> Node : CONTROL: Closed Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1
deactivate Node

@enduml
```
